results.test_code:
# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_bigquery_snapshot_config_uses_alias_target_project_and_target_dataset__a1():
    path = '/workspace/test/integration/004_simple_snapshot_test/test-check-col-snapshots-bq/snapshot.sql'
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        source = f.read()
    assert 'target_project=' in source, "Expected snapshot config to use BigQuery alias 'target_project=' (instead of 'target_database=')."

def test_bigquery_snapshot_config_uses_alias_target_project_and_target_dataset__a2():
    path = '/workspace/test/integration/004_simple_snapshot_test/test-check-col-snapshots-bq/snapshot.sql'
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        source = f.read()
    assert 'target_dataset=' in source, "Expected snapshot config to use BigQuery alias 'target_dataset=' (instead of 'target_schema=')."

def test_bigquery_snapshot_config_uses_alias_target_project_and_target_dataset__a3():
    path = '/workspace/test/integration/004_simple_snapshot_test/test-check-col-snapshots-bq/snapshot.sql'
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        source = f.read()
    assert re.search('\\btarget_database\\s*=', source) is None, "Did not expect 'target_database=' in this BigQuery snapshot config file; it should use the alias 'target_project='."

def test_bigquery_snapshot_config_uses_alias_target_project_and_target_dataset__a4():
    path = '/workspace/test/integration/004_simple_snapshot_test/test-check-col-snapshots-bq/snapshot.sql'
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        source = f.read()
    assert re.search('\\btarget_schema\\s*=', source) is None, "Did not expect 'target_schema=' in this BigQuery snapshot config file; it should use the alias 'target_dataset='."
if __name__ == '__main__':
    test_bigquery_snapshot_config_uses_alias_target_project_and_target_dataset()
